patterns.title: Multimodal Design and Layout
patterns.description: Tasks that turn a brief into a visual artifact or asset where composition, visual fidelity, and creative interpretation matter.
patterns.coverage_note: The provided source sets contain very little true layout work. Current coverage is limited to image-generation-style design briefs.

patterns.title: Information Search and Fact Collection
patterns.description: Tasks that gather, verify, compare, and assemble factual information from live sources or public APIs into structured deliverables.
patterns.coverage_note: This is the strongest pattern in the current source sets. It includes open-ended research tasks and API-driven directory, weather, repo, and economic snapshots.

patterns.title: Data Extraction and Structured Processing
patterns.description: Tasks that read local inputs, extract fields or signals, run ordered transforms, and produce structured outputs with correctness constraints.
patterns.coverage_note: Coverage is anchored by realistic file editing, spreadsheet analysis, PDF extraction, and ordered local tool pipelines.

patterns.title: Content Writing and Packaging
patterns.description: Tasks that convert source materials or gathered facts into polished writing, briefings, summaries, rewritten content, or curated packages.
patterns.coverage_note: These cases were favored when they started from source material or a concrete artifact contract, not when they were generic one-paragraph writing prompts.

patterns.title: Browser Operations and Workflow Automation
patterns.description: Tasks that require multi-step, stateful procedures across tools or sessions, often with sequencing constraints and persistence requirements.
patterns.coverage_note: The current sources do not offer strong browser UI cases. The imported families here cover workflow automation shapes rather than literal browser clicking.

patterns.title: Code Implementation and Tool Development
patterns.description: Tasks that create code, scripts, project scaffolding, or developer tooling under an explicit file and artifact contract.
patterns.coverage_note: Only code-centric families with a clear output artifact were retained. Thin or generic file-creation prompts were excluded.

families.family_focus: Read config, build a script, and document the workflow end to end.
families.task_shape: Stateful multi-step automation over local config plus generated artifacts.

families.family_focus: Persist knowledge to workspace state and retrieve it across sessions.
families.task_shape: Multi-session workflow with file-based memory persistence.

families.family_focus: Scaffold a small Python library with packaging, tests, and README files.
families.task_shape: Project setup under a fixed file-and-directory contract.

families.family_focus: Write a simple data-fetching script with output and error handling.
families.task_shape: Single-file implementation under a concrete script contract.

families.family_focus: Rewrite robotic source text into more natural prose while preserving meaning.
families.task_shape: Input document transformation with tone and style goals.

families.family_focus: Read multiple internal research notes and turn them into an executive daily briefing.
families.task_shape: Seeded corpus synthesis into a concise business-ready brief.

families.family_focus: Translate a technical PDF into an accessible, audience-specific summary.
families.task_shape: Local document comprehension followed by controlled rewriting for a target audience.

families.family_focus: Review an inbox-like workspace and produce an action-oriented triage summary.
families.task_shape: Seeded communication corpus to prioritization brief.

families.family_focus: Collect recipe information and package it into a compact cookbook artifact.
families.task_shape: Repeated lookup followed by curated packaging into a recipe collection.

families.family_focus: Apply coordinated config edits across multiple file formats.
families.task_shape: Seeded workspace with precise transformation requirements and cross-file consistency checks.

families.family_focus: Run an ordered local analysis pipeline over multiple DNA sequences.
families.task_shape: Repeated local-tool pipeline with derived fields and order-sensitive steps.

families.family_focus: Read a PDF report and extract exact factual answers into a fixed output file.
families.task_shape: Local document comprehension with answer normalization.

families.family_focus: Read mixed spreadsheet inputs and compute a compact analytical report.
families.task_shape: Local CSV plus XLSX analysis with derived metrics and narrative summary.

families.family_focus: Collect economic indicators for several countries and compare them.
families.task_shape: Repeated public-data retrieval with tiering and rank derivation.

families.family_focus: Analyze repository metadata and activity signals across multiple GitLab projects.
families.task_shape: Repeated project research with cross-project rollup metrics.

families.family_focus: Survey a market segment and synthesize competitor facts into a concise research report.
families.task_shape: Live research followed by structured competitive synthesis.

families.family_focus: Find live events and normalize them into a verified event list.
families.task_shape: Open-ended web research with fixed fields per entity.

families.family_focus: Build country-level university directories and summary statistics.
families.task_shape: Repeated API collection with aggregation into a directory JSON artifact.

families.family_focus: Collect weather facts for multiple cities and summarize comparisons.
families.task_shape: Repeated API workflow with tool ordering constraints and summary rollup.

families.family_focus: Turn a natural-language visual brief into a saved image artifact.
families.task_shape: Single creative brief to single exported asset.
